---
title: "Welcome to the New Site"
description: "A fresh start — consolidating my research, teaching, policy writing, and data projects into one place."
author: "Zahid Asghar"
date: "2026-02-16"
categories: [Announcement]
aliases:
  - /posts/welcome.html
---

After years of maintaining separate platforms for different aspects of my work, I've consolidated everything into a single site built with [Quarto](https://quarto.org/).

Here you'll find:

- **Research** — my publications organized by theme, from economic measurement to causal inference
- **Policy & Commentary** — essays on AI governance, GDP methodology, and education reform
- **Teaching & Training** — course materials, workshop resources, and R tutorials
- **Data & Code** — open-source projects and reproducible analyses
- **Blog** — new writing on economics, data science, and Pakistan's statistical infrastructure

I'll be publishing regularly on topics at the intersection of economic measurement, data science, and public policy. If you'd like to stay updated, subscribe to the newsletter on the [homepage](../index.qmd).

The site is open source and built entirely with Quarto and GitHub Pages. If you spot any issues, feel free to raise them on [GitHub](https://github.com/zahedasghar).
